# Rename Rules

Use these rules to standardize names consistently.

## Common Patterns
- Normalize dates (YYYY-MM-DD)
- Title case for human-readable names
- Remove known junk tokens (e.g., copy, final, v2) when safe
- Replace whitespace and separators consistently

## Collision Handling
- Preserve order with numeric suffixes
- Keep original extension unchanged
- Avoid renaming across file types unless requested
